body:
## Summary
- fix acpx override usage by omitting the positional `codex` agent when `--agent` is set
- keeps the Codex custom command carrying `openai_base_url` / `model`

## Verification
- `npm run build && node --test dist/__tests__/acpx-adapter.test.js`
- `npm test`

## Context
PR #5 exposed the next error: acpx rejects combining positional agent with `--agent` override. This patch uses the documented global override form: `acpx --agent "codex-acp ..." exec <prompt>`.
title: Use acpx agent override without positional Codex
